description: The User Inspector component is better described on it's page, User Inspector.

fields.ViewUser: The user this inspector is currently updating through.
fields.ViewGroup: What kind of information group this is inspecting.
fields.ViewStreamGroup: The kind of value stream group this is viewing.
fields._currentUser: The current user this is viewing.
fields._currentViewGroup: What kind of information group this is currently inspecting.
fields._currentStreamGroup: The kind of value stream group this is currently viewing.
fields._userListContentRoot: The slot to place user stream/properties content when viewing a user.
fields._workersContentRoot: The slot to place user worker content when viewing a user.
fields._userText: The string field that stores text on the user being viewed.

methods.FilterWorker: A sync delegate that filters worker C# objects for the use of displaying those objects in this inspector.
